markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff call for the GrowthX-Navan SEO engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Shift:** Move from an SMB/end-user focus to targeting enterprise clients (5,000+ employees) to capture higher-value accounts and improve paid search efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [**Content Gap:** Current content drives traffic but not conversions. The new strategy will focus on bottom-of-funnel content tailored to specific enterprise personas (e.g., CPO) and their "jobs to be done."](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)
  - [**Positioning Challenge:** Navan must reframe its narrative to combat competitor FUD (Fear, Uncertainty, and Doubt) regarding its AI leadership and 24/7 support, which is superior but perceived as weak due to a lingering COVID-era reputation.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [**Engagement Plan:** An 8-week Strategy Sprint will define the content strategy through foundational artifacts (personas, guidelines) and calibration blogs, scaling to 5 articles/week by week 4–5.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Inefficient Growth & Content Gaps

  - [**Primary Driver:** Improve paid search efficiency by shifting focus to organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [**Content Gap:** Current content drives top-of-funnel traffic but fails to convert.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create bottom-of-funnel content that directly addresses enterprise persona needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=2452.0)
      - [**Need:** \~150 missing content pieces, including pillar pages, review articles, and competitor comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Expand from an SMB/end-user focus to targeting enterprise accounts (5,000+ employees).](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Enterprise buyers have distinct needs (e.g., M\&A impact, travel manager career paths) that require a different content approach than SMBs.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

### The Solution: Targeted Content & Strategic Positioning

  - [**Core Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [**Single Platform:** Unifies travel and expense, solving data silos common in M\&A-heavy companies.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Dynamic Policies & Rewards:** Adjusts spend caps based on real-time market rates and rewards users for booking under policy, driving adoption and savings.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [**Superior Inventory:** Consolidates sources (direct, Expedia, NDC) for comprehensive, competitive options.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**24/7 Support:** AI-first with human backup for complex issues, resulting in faster resolution times.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Positioning Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
      - [**AI Leadership:** Reclaim the AI narrative by highlighting Navan's long-standing, embedded AI capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Support Reputation:** Counter competitor FUD by proving the superiority of Navan's 24/7 support, which has fully recovered from COVID-era resource constraints.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [**Legacy Competitors:** Overcome buyer inertia by demonstrating how Navan's tech solves specific pain points (e.g., Concur's data silos, FCM's 1,000-hour implementations).](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [**Travel Manager Objections:** Address fears of job displacement by framing Navan as a tool for career advancement and strategic leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

### The Plan: 8-Week Strategy Sprint

  - [**Phase 1: Research & Artifact Creation (Weeks 1–3)**](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3026.0)
      - [**Goal:** Become experts on Navan's business, product, and audience.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3040.0)
          - ["What We Heard" document summarizing this call.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3026.0)
          - [Foundational artifacts: Writing Guidelines, Audience Personas, Company Context.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3040.0)
          - [Initial content strategy with topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3071.0)
          - [Keyword research → 40+ topic ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3071.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Calibration & Scaling (Weeks 3–8)**](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)
      - [**Goal:** Align on content voice, tone, and depth before scaling production.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)
          - [Produce one calibration blog for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)
          - [Produce three additional calibration blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)
          - [Scale production to **5 articles per week** by week 4–5.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)
  - [**Content Operations:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=2844.0)
      - [**Review Process:** Navan will manage internal proofreading and legal review. Legal review is required for product claims or "number one" statements.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=2844.0)
      - [**Publishing:** GrowthX will publish directly to Navan's Contentful CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=2918.0)
      - [**Content Hygiene:** GrowthX will conduct an audit to prevent cannibalization and identify refresh opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3172.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3026.0)
      - [Send "What We Heard" document and next steps via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3026.0)
      - [Deliver foundational artifacts (guidelines, personas) by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3040.0)
      - [Schedule weekly syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3040.0)
      - [Coordinate Contentful access with Moran.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3391.0)
  - [**Navan:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3391.0)
      - [Add GrowthX's email to Contentful.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3391.0)
      - [Provide prompt, detailed feedback on all sprint deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/Gqv3N3y-5Z82xsKH783pCMNoJ1L39TFh?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
